UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGPM 665 EDDY L.P., A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIANI, RANDY AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665 EDDY STREET, APARTMENT 64 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
